mapper.select: SELECT j.id, j.company_id, j.title, j.type, j.industry, j.location, j.min_salary, j.max_salary, j.education, j.experience, j.requirements, j.responsibilities, j.benefits, j.deadline, j.status, j.created_at, j.updated_at, cp.company_name AS company_name FROM jobs j LEFT JOIN company_profiles cp ON cp.id = j.company_id ORDER BY j.created_at DESC

SELECT j.id, j.company_id, j.title, j.type, j.industry, j.location, j.min_salary, j.max_salary, j.education, j.experience, j.requirements, j.responsibilities, j.benefits, j.deadline, j.status, j.created_at, j.updated_at, cp.company_name AS company_name FROM jobs j LEFT JOIN company_profiles cp ON cp.id = j.company_id WHERE j.id = #{id}
